custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(AssetDisplayPageEntry.assetDisplayPageEntryId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM AssetDisplayPageEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classNameId = ?) AND ( ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 1) AND (1 = ?) ) OR ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.layoutPageTemplateEntryId = ?) AND (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 2) ) ) [$CLASS_TYPE_ID$]

SELECT AssetDisplayPageEntry.* FROM AssetDisplayPageEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classNameId = ?) AND ( ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 1) AND (1 = ?) ) OR ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.layoutPageTemplateEntryId = ?) AND (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 2) ) ) [$CLASS_TYPE_ID$]
INNER JOIN AssetEntry on ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classNameId = AssetEntry.classNameId) AND (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classPK = AssetEntry.classPK) )
